title: If You Use Agent Zero, This Video is for You (EPIC FAIL)
summary: Jordan Urbs documents a failed attempt to build an AI-generated ad campaign using Agent Zero, encountering repeated LiteLLM errors and critical crashes. The video documents failures in installing custom skills, integrating Venice AI video generation, and updating the framework, concluding that Agent Zero is unreliable for production work compared to alternatives like Claude Code.
